feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAC Trace Level - debug?
entry.content:
Hello,

 

I wonder 'Trace Level' in SAC System administration.

I want to see a log more detailed than 'error' trace level which is default option now.

In that case, i have to choice 'debug' level, right?

 

and also that configuration will be reflected in 'job monitor' , correct?

(only fail job, not the success??)

 

There's a some text about this at SAC Help but it is not a detailed

so anyone know about this please share your experience or knowledge please.

thank you!

 

Regards of,

hj.

entry.title: change in Input variables which i am taking from CDS view to show current on load as calendar.
entry.content:
Hello Team 

I had a requirement in SAC dashboard that when dashboard loads it should load on as on date. and user wanted a calendar to pop up to selected the date which was not directly possible in SAC dymanic filtter as it gives look back and front option. so to achive this requirement we used CDS view parameter. Now user want to control this parameter look n feel and error message which it is popluting while selecting the wrong dates. I have tried to change throgh scripting but i am unable to control it. 

Could you Please provide me the solution how should i take it forward.

entry.title: change in Input variables which i am taking from CDS view to show current on load as calendar.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a requirement in an SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) dashboard where, on load, the data should default to the “As On Date” (current date).

Additionally, the user wants a calendar popup to select a date. Since SAC dynamic date filters only provide look back and look forward options, this requirement could not be fulfilled directly using standard filters.

To achieve this, we implemented a CDS view parameter for date selection.

However, we are now facing the following challenges:

  • The look & feel of the CDS parameter prompt (calendar UI) cannot be customized
  • Error messages are displayed when users select invalid dates, and these messages are coming from the backend
  • We are unable to control or override these behaviors using SAC scripting

Questions:

  1. Is there any way in SAC to customize the UI (calendar behavior) of CDS parameters?
  2. Can we override or handle backend error messages within SAC?
  3. What would be the recommended approach to handle such a requirement while ensuring better user experience?

entry.title: SAC Story: How to send notification alert via email when measure in threshold is RED?
entry.content: On SAC Story, How to send notification alert via email when measure in threshold is RED? #SAC

entry.title: SAC Email notifications
entry.content:
We’re looking for a solution that can send an email notification to users when a KPI value drops by a specified amount.

We’ve already tried using the Application.sendNotification() API in SAP Analytics Cloud, but it only generates in-app SAC notifications and does not send emails.

We need a way to ensure that users receive these notifications via email, specifically on a designated day of each month.

entry.title: in sap analytics cloud story how to lookup a value from previous row
entry.content:
Hello Friends

I want to be able to create a shipment report where yesterday's unshipped (Carryover) deliveries show as Opening Balance of the next day.  I can easily do this in BOBJ (see below) using PREVIOUS function.  Since PREVIOUS is not available in SAC, is there a trick to produce similar report?

entry.title: Cascading Filters (story filters) with single selection
entry.content:
Hi all.

SAC ODE Story (BW Live Model).
Requirement: 2 Story filters (Dimension1, Dimension2) must behave as follows:

  • Single Selection.
  • The filter on Dimension1 must affect the filter on Dimension2, but the filter on Dimension2 must NOT affect the first filter.

Explanation: The filter on Dimension1 must always show all members available, regardless of the value selected in Dimension2.

Is it possible?

Thanks in advance,
Luis.

entry.title: Story 2.0 -SAC Story running for Saved date
entry.content:
Story 2.0 -SAC Story running for Saved date

 

When we used the URL with no filter value applied, the HANA variable would work successfully

When we used the URL with a filter value applied, the HANA variable would not run.

entry.title: Is it possible to set header rows for unpivoting during import jobs in the new model of SAC?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to do unpivoting during import jobs in the new model of SAC. I noted that header rows could be set in the classic model as demonstrated in video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uyKpkAr9Z5c.

 
But I cannot find it in the new model. I just want to check if this setting doesn’t exist in the new model, or if I’ve missed it somewhere.

Any tips or guidance would be highly appreciated! Thank you in advance.

SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Migrating to optimised stories
entry.content:
Hey, I'm a SAC system admin for my company and have optimised all stories / applications in production over the past months. However, I can't be sure some users don't have old stories they still use that aren't optimised.

When they get deprecated I appreciate you won't be able to create them or make changes to existing ones, but do they actually get deleted? I need to know if you retain view access.

Thanks

entry.title: Smart Features (Smart Insights / Just Ask) with Fiscal Period Models in SAC – Any Workarounds?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I’m currently working on several FP&A and consolidation use cases in SAP Analytics Cloud where models are built using Fiscal Period / Fiscal Year dimensions (standard setup aligned with S/4HANA and finance processes).

As expected, we are facing the known limitation:
Smart Features (Smart Insights, Just Ask, Search to Insight) are not supported on models using fiscal time settings

Have you implemented any effective workaround or design pattern to enable or approximate Smart Features on fiscal-based models?

Specifically interested in:

  • Use of parallel calendar-based models → how do you manage reconciliation/governance?
  • Any approach leveraging Data Analyzer / calculated measures to mimic Smart Insights behavior?
  • Experience using Datasphere transformations to bridge fiscal ↔ calendar time for AI use cases
  • Trade-offs you’ve seen between accuracy vs usability

Context

In our architecture:

  • Planning and reporting models (Rev&Exp, Consolidation, Workforce, etc.) are fully fiscal-based
  • Data is sourced via SAP Datasphere and aligned with finance calendars
  • Business users (FP&A, Controllers) are increasingly asking for augmented analytics capabilities directly on these models

Appreciate any insights, patterns, or lessons learned from your implementations.

Thanks in advance.

SAP Analytics Cloud SAP Datasphere SAP Analytics Cloud, augmented analytics

entry.title: SAC Live Connection to S/4HANA Private Cloud via CORS
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community, I'm currently connecting SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) to SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition using the CORS Direct method for a Live Data Connection. I'm running into two issues that I haven't been able to fully resolve, and I'd appreciate any guidance from the community.

My current setup

  • SAP Analytics Cloud 
  • SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition 
  • Live Data Connection configured using CORS Direct method
  • Authentication method: User Name and Password (Basic Auth)

Issue 1 - Credentials required every time I open a story

Every time I open a Story that uses a Live model connected to S/4HANA, I get prompted to enter my S/4HANA username and password before the data loads.

My current workaround: I open a Fiori launchpad session in a separate browser tab first so that the S/4HANA session cookie exists in the browser, and then the data loads in SAC without the popup.

This is not a sustainable solution for end users. Is this related to the SSL certificate on the S/4HANA side? Or is this purely a missing SSO configuration?

Issue 2 - SAC mobile app: stories load with no data (design only)

On the SAC mobile app (iOS/Android) (or the browser same issue ), I can log into SAC successfully, I can see my stories and the design renders correctly, but no data is loaded. The charts and tables are empty.

I tried opening a Fiori session in the mobile browser first (same workaround as desktop), but it doesn't help, data still doesn't appear in the app.

My understanding is that CORS relies on browser-level cookie sharing, which native mobile apps don't support in the same way. Is this correct? Is CORS fundamentally incompatible with the SAC mobile app/ browser for Live Connections?

 

SO my question for the community : 

- How eliminate the S/4HANA credential popup everytime ??

- Is there a recommended architecture that handles both desktop and mobile in a Private Cloud / On-Premise-like context?

entry.title: SAC - Export incomplete without the page Initialization
entry.content:
Hello Team,

In SAC, the issue I encountered was that I had written initialization scripts across 14 pages of the story. However, as the client starts exporting the story without navigating through all the pages, the export remains incomplete. As a result, the exported file contained partially loaded data.

So I tried 1st initializing all the pages and then exporting, but this is taking way longer than expected,

Thanks in advance for your suggestions/workarounds.

entry.title: How to create a Tunnel connection to Datasphere in SAC?
entry.content:
How to create a Tunnel connection to Datasphere in SAC?
 

Please follow the step-by-step on the SAP Help Page: Live Data Connections to SAP Datasphere
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/ad4281e2875949f0b4d45d1072ff4c38.html

As per "Procedure" step 4.

From the Connection Type drop-down list, select Tunnel.

And please mind that for tunnel connections, SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere users must be provisioned with the same IdP.

entry.title: Do we need an SAC Agent if my BW source system is hosted in SAP Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

All our BW systems will be moved under BDC and hosted in SAP's cloud environment. We have several Live and import connections to SAC from out current on-premise BW system, and the connection makes use of SAC agent and cloud connector. Our question is regarding the need for SAC Agent. 

When we move our on-premise system to SAP Cloud environment, do we still need SAC Agent, (based on your feedback we need to plan the installation of SAC Agent apart from Cloud connector). Because SAP documentation says "SAP Analytics Cloud agent is an on-premise data connectivity component that is used to establish import data connections for data sources"

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/bdf055159cbb4f36b26c93ccb0c56066.html

entry.title: Data Retraction SAC to ECC
entry.content:
Dear team,

I would like to know if is possible to retract planning data from SAC to ECC or it is only possible to Export from SAC and import to ECC. The customer has a BW 7.4 but not sure if they can use it in the middle of the process

Many thanks in advance,

entry.title: SAC Reporting Dynamic calculation Between Versions
entry.content:
“I need to create a dynamic calculation defined as B/W A i.e. (Selection V1 − Selection V3). My dataset contains two versions: Actual and Forecast, Selection V1 & Selection V3 both are Restricted Measures with version input controls. Selection V1 should always reference Forecast data for 2026, and Selection V3 should always reference Actual data for 2025. How can i achieve this 

 

is logic so that it consistently pulls from the correct version and time period?”

entry.title: Datasphere not appearing as a selectable data storage location in SAC
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have completed all the required configuration and tenant links between SAC and Datasphere. 

But we are not able to see the datasphere as a storage location to select during the Model creation.

Would like to know which steps we might have missed.

Below are the steps we completed.

  1. SAP Analytics Cloud is running on HANA Cloud
  2. SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere are located in the same data center. [SAP datacenters are not in scope]
  3. SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere use the same identity provider
  4. SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere tenants are linked for seamless planning in a 1:1 relationship by the system owner

Thank you for your support.

Regards,

Prasad Rangudu

entry.title: Custom enhancement required on Project Control tile in PS module; need suitable BAdI suggestion.
entry.content: Custom enhancement is required on the Project Control tile in the PS (Project System) module. The requirement involves adding/modifying business logic at the tile or application level. However, the appropriate BAdI or enhancement spot for implementing this change is not identified yet. Guidance is needed to determine the correct BAdI or technical approach (such as OData service enhancement or backend exit) to achieve the desired customization.

entry.title: Project Control Enterprise & Project Brief tile; need suitable BAdI suggestion.
entry.content: Custom enhancement is required on the Project Control tile in the PS (Project System) module. This requirement involves adding/modifying business logic at the tile or application level. However, the appropriate BAdI or enhancement spot to implement this change is not identified yet. Guidance is needed to determine the correct BAdI or technical approach (such as OData service enhancement or backend exit) to achieve the desired customization.
